title: Add permissions: contents: write to GitHub Actions workflow
source_finding: Architecture D2 — default GH Actions token lacks write permission, dedup breaks silently

title: Normalize URL before SHA256 hash (https, trailing slash, query param sort, strip utm_*)
source_finding: Architecture D3 — same AO with URL variants bypasses dedup

title: Add NFD accent + lowercase normalization before keyword matching (unicodedata)
source_finding: Architecture D4 — older francophone portals inconsistent on accents causing missed AOs

title: Add source_failures counter to state.json + alert section in digest when threshold exceeded
source_finding: Architecture D5 — DCMP silent failure undetectable without counter; D6 — state.json schema extended

title: Add timeout=(5, 10) to all requests.get() calls in 5 scrapers
source_finding: Performance D8 — hung HTTP request burns 6h GitHub Actions allocation

title: Wrap entire orchestration in top-level try/except — always send an email (even on crash)
source_finding: Code quality — design doc policy 'never crash silently' requires top-level catch

title: Implement purge_old_entries() in dedup.py — remove seen hashes older than 30 days on each run
source_finding: Code quality — retention policy described in design doc but not assigned to any module

title: Add SMTP retry (1x) + explicit GH Actions log on failure for Gmail delivery verification
source_finding: Outside voice D9 — Gmail silently blocked from cloud IPs; no delivery confirmation

title: Write full pytest + responses test suite (filter, dedup, all scrapers mocked, email composition)
source_finding: Test review D7 — 0/37 codepaths tested, greenfield project

title: Remove jeuneafrique.py from source list — Cloudflare + ToS block HTML scraping
source_finding: Outside voice D10 — Jeune Afrique has Cloudflare protection and ToS prohibiting scraping
